# KNOB_REFERENCE — auto-generated
> Generated by `v2b-syndata docs-gen`. Do not edit by hand;
> the hand-written usage guide section follows the auto block.
## Override path syntax
Two channels:
- **Registry channel**: `bucket.knob` paths declared in `configs/knobs.yaml`.
- **Deep channel**: paths under one of the prefixes below; values flow into
  the population's `region_distributions` overlay block at resolve time.
## Source categories
Each resolved knob carries one of:
- `explicit` — set via `--override` or scenario YAML.
- `descriptor:<name>` — supplied by a Tier-0 descriptor expansion.
- `calibration:<provenance>` — supplied by an ACN-Data calibration run
  (e.g. `calibration:acn_data_2019_2021_20260506`).
- `default` — fell through all chains; used `knobs.yaml::default`.
## Deep-channel parameter ranges

### `user_behavior.region_distributions.<region>.<dist>.<param>`
| leaf (`<dist>.<param>`) | range |
|---|---|
| `arrival.mu` | `[6.0, 20.0]` |
| `arrival.sigma` | `[0.01, 6.0]` |
| `arrival.w1` | `[0.0, 1.0]` |
| `arrival.mu1` | `[6.0, 20.0]` |
| `arrival.sigma1` | `[0.01, 6.0]` |
| `arrival.mu2` | `[6.0, 20.0]` |
| `arrival.sigma2` | `[0.01, 6.0]` |
| `dwell.k` | `[0.01, 5.0]` |
| `dwell.lambda` | `[0.01, 24.0]` |
| `soc_arrival.alpha` | `[0.01, 50.0]` |
| `soc_arrival.beta` | `[0.01, 50.0]` |
| `soc_depart.alpha` | `[0.01, 50.0]` |
| `soc_depart.beta` | `[0.01, 50.0]` |
| `copula.rho_gaussian` | `[-0.99, 0.99]` |
